# AI Session: Database Schema Design

## Date: 2026-05-01

## Context
Designing the database schema for the Personal Task Tracker API.

## AI Interaction Summary
- Asked Claude to design SQLite schema for tasks and labels with relationships
- Claude suggested adding indexes for performance
- Reviewed and approved the schema.sql file
- Claude helped implement the database.js wrapper with proper error handling

## Key Decisions
- Used snake_case for table/column names
- Added task_labels junction table for many-to-many relationship
- Included created_at/updated_at timestamps

## Code Generated by AI
- schema.sql (entire file)
- database.js connection wrapper
- Basic CRUD operations in controllers

## Human Verification
- Checked for SQL injection vulnerabilities
- Verified foreign key constraints
- Tested schema with sample data
